entries.rfp: Request for Proposal — formal solicitation document.
entries.rfq: Request for Quotation — invitation for price quotes.
entries.po: Purchase Order — buyer's formal commitment to purchase.
entries.sla: Service Level Agreement — contractual performance commitment.
entries.moq: Minimum Order Quantity — smallest unit count a supplier accepts.
entries.lead_time: Lead time — duration from order placement to delivery.
entries.incoterms: Incoterms — international commercial terms defining buyer/seller responsibilities.
entries.vendor_consolidation: Vendor consolidation — reducing number of suppliers to leverage scale.
entries.duplicate_vendor: Duplicate vendor — same supplier registered under multiple records, causing payment fragmentation.
entries.early_pay_discount: Early-pay discount — pricing reduction for paying invoices before due date.
